# Q4S B.V.
> Technical Talent for Critical Projects

Q4S B.V. is a specialised technical recruitment and project partner agency founded in 2015, headquartered in Barendrecht, Netherlands. We connect highly qualified QA/QC professionals, NDT inspectors, source inspectors, welding specialists, and technical engineers with complex industrial and infrastructure projects in the Netherlands and internationally.

Our core philosophy is Quality Force: the right person in the right place makes the difference between a good project and an outstanding one.

## Services

- Recruitment & Selection: targeted placement of QA/QC professionals, field inspectors, and technical specialists
- Technical Secondment (Detachering): flexible deployment of qualified personnel for project duration
- Source Inspection & Expediting: on-site supplier monitoring worldwide
- NDT Consultancy: Non-Destructive Testing experts (UT, RT, MT, PT, ET, VT) for weld inspection, material testing, and system audits
- QA/QC Project Support: acting as an extension of your quality organisation

## Sectors

Oil & Gas, Offshore & Marine, Petrochemicals, Energy & Utilities, Shipbuilding, Construction & Infrastructure

## NDT Expertise

- Level II & III certified inspectors (CSWIP, PCN, ASNT)
- Weld inspection and welding coordination (IWI, CWI)
- WPS/PQR procedure review and qualification
- Inspections per ASME, EN, API, ISO standards

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2015
- Certifications: ISO 9001, VCA, SNA NEN 4400-1
- KvK: 69073287
- 10+ years experience, 200+ placements, 50+ clients, 96% client satisfaction
